sys_hub_flow.annotation: Stop Tanium Action after complete on at least N endpoints.
sys_hub_flow.description: Check the status of the specified Tanium Action every 5 minutes. Once the action is completed on the specified number of endpoints (or more), stop the action in Tanium.

logic_definition.display_value: Wait for a duration of time

sys_hub_flow_logic.comment: Set action status to Stopped now that we've stopped the action.
Set completed count and Tanium Action Status (so far)
Check action status every 5 minutes, until completed endpoints is >= minimum completion count input value (or until the action is Stopped or Completed).

sys_documentation.hint: The ID of the action triggered in Tanium, from Action History
sys_documentation.label: Tanium Action ID
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_186116e1dbafc910495d70f33996195a

sys_documentation.hint: Stop the action after this many endpoints or more have completed it.
sys_documentation.label: Minimum Completion Count
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_flow_input_186116e1dbafc910495d70f33996195a

sys_hub_flow_logic.comment: Check action status every 5 minutes, until completed endpoints is >= minimum completion count input value (or until the action is Stopped or Completed).
Set action status to Stopped now that we've stopped the action.

logic_definition.display_value: Wait for a duration of time

sys_hub_flow_logic.comment: Set completed count and Tanium Action Status (so far)

sys_documentation.hint: Stop the action after this many endpoints or more have completed it.
